title: Sleeping Bags
description: Craftable sleeping bags that let you skip the night without changing your spawn point.
body:
## Sleeping Bags

Sleeping Bags adds craftable sleeping bags that let you sleep through the night **without changing your spawn point**.

When used at night, a sleeping screen appears with **“Sleeping in sleeping bag...”** and a **“Leave sleeping bag”** button. After a short moment, the night is skipped automatically.

### Crafting
Craft a sleeping bag in a crafting table using **7 wool in a U-shape + 1 string**.  
The color of the sleeping bag matches the wool color.

Pattern:
- Wool, String, Wool
- Wool, (empty), Wool
- Wool, Wool, Wool

### Dyeing
Recolor any sleeping bag by combining it with any dye.

### Notes
- Works in the Overworld at night.
- Does not set or change your respawn point.

### Dependencies
- Fabric API
